sections.paragraph:
Φρόντων, ωνος, ὁ (Lat. Fronto. The Gk. form of the name in Jos., Bell. 6, 238; 242; OGI 533, 34; CIG II add. 2349k; III 5120; IV 9919; IPergamon 511; PGiss 59 II; POxy 1188) Fronto, member of the Ephesian congregation IEph 2:1.

Lat. Lat. = Latin

Gk. Gk. = Greek

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

CIG CIG = Corpus Inscriptionum Graecarum—List 3

add. add. = additional

IPergamon IPergamon =Die Inschriften von Pergamon—List 3

PGiss PGiss = Griechische Papyri . . . zu Giessen—List 4

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

IEph IEph = Ignatius to the Ephesians—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1066
